ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the university is located */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the university */,
  "degree_length" TEXT /* Length of the degree program (e.g., 4 Year, 2 Year) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of enrolled students */,
  "acceptance_rate" TEXT /* Acceptance rate of the university */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the university */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES university_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition cost entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "in_state_tuition" INTEGER /* Tuition cost for in-state students */,
  "out_of_state_tuition" INTEGER /* Tuition cost for out-of-state students */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the tuition cost data */,
  "undergraduate_tuition" INTEGER /* Tuition cost for undergraduate students */,
  "graduate_tuition" INTEGER /* Tuition cost for graduate students */,
  "international_tuition" INTEGER /* Tuition cost for international students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_costs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_and_board_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room and board cost entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "room_and_board" INTEGER /* Room and board cost */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the room and board cost data */,
  "on_campus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cost is for on-campus housing */,
  "meal_plan" TEXT /* Type of meal plan included */,
  "off_campus" INTEGER /* Cost for off-campus housing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_and_board_costs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total cost entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "in_state_total" INTEGER /* Total cost for in-state students */,
  "out_of_state_total" INTEGER /* Total cost for out-of-state students */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the total cost data */,
  "undergraduate_total" INTEGER /* Total cost for undergraduate students */,
  "graduate_total" INTEGER /* Total cost for graduate students */,
  "international_total" INTEGER /* Total cost for international students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_costs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, financial aid officer, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position or title of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the university data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the university data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the university type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the university type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
